word: デモンストレーション
pronunciation: でもんすとれーしょん

meaning: enforcement; implementation; putting into practice; carrying out; operation; working
not writing or contacting for a while
to produce; to yield; to cause; to result from; to arise; to be generated
ticket window; teller window; counter; contact person; point of contact
matter to be checked or investigated
finance; financing; credit transacting; loaning of money; circulation of money
